# 14\. May \- Thursday

* Home \- Munchen \= **4 h 30 min**  
* [Madison Beer concert at 19:30](https://www.ticketmaster.de/event/madison-beer-the-locket-tour-tickets/428796075?language=en-us) in [Zenith, Munich](https://maps.app.goo.gl/vTjsR9ZDZPHaGqyS9)  
* After: Munchen \- Nuremberg \= **2 h 15 min**


## Accommodation 14\. May - 17\. May

### [Peaceful log cabin in Nuremberg metropolitan area](https://www.airbnb.com/rooms/886758705913939812?source_impression_id=p3_1774692966_P3Y7VbNClRJEkgHE)

* [Heroldsbach, Germany](https://www.google.com/maps/place/91336+Heroldsbach,+Germany/@47.8826356,10.7051754,7z/data=!4m6!3m5!1s0x47a21d0ad9e1575b:0x41eda32beb5de80!8m2!3d49.6904157!4d11.0045447!16s%2Fm%2F02q34jl?entry=ttu&g_ep=EgoyMDI2MDMyNC4wIKXMDSoASAFQAw%3D%3D)

![][image13]![][image14]

* Rating: 5.0 / 5 (47)  
* 15 min to the wedding  
* Very cute, nice outdoors, cheap  
* A bit weird bed, smaller  
* **PRICE: 297 €**

![][image15]![][image16]![][image17]

# 15\. May \- Friday

* Nuremberg \- Eggolsheim \= **40 min**  
* [Wedding](https://www.theknot.com/katgil) at **2 pm** at [Castle Schloss Jägersburg](https://maps.app.goo.gl/weyfxWsy1FcU6oEv8)

# 16\. May \- Saturday

* Explore Nuremberg

# 17\. May \- Sunday

* Checkout at around 12 pm  
* **4 h** to Salzburg

## Accommodation 17\. May - 18\. May

### [Castle with private garden & parking](https://www.airbnb.com/rooms/40078320?source_impression_id=p3_1774693514_P3tucgT1b639UQzk)

* [Linzer Bundesstraße 1, Salzburg, Salzburg 5020](https://www.google.com/maps/place/Linzer+Bundesstra%C3%9Fe+1,+5020+Salzburg,+Austria/@47.8152551,12.9815475,12.6z/data=!4m6!3m5!1s0x47769083a0f2501b:0x93fa051df37fcf40!8m2!3d47.8087094!4d13.0630944!16s%2Fg%2F11c5bth2lh?entry=ttu&g_ep=EgoyMDI2MDMyNC4wIKXMDSoASAFQAw%3D%3D)

![][image24]

* Rating: 4.9 / 5 (337)  
* Very cute, garden, in the center  
* Maybe a bit expensive  
* **PRICE: 189 €**

![][image25]![][image26]![][image27]

# 18\. May \- Monday

* Checkout at around 12 pm  
* **3 h 15 min** to home
